channel.title: Shruthi's RSS Feed
channel.description: This is an RSS feed for Shruthi Anandraman's Labs for her Intro to ITWS Class

item.title: Lab 01 - Personal Setup
item.description: Creating and establishing all the softwares and resources needed for the labs and assignments of the Intro to ITWS Class.

item.title: Lab 02 - Resume
item.description: Developed a resume describing Shruhti's academic acheivements, projects, skills and work experiences.

item.title: Lab 03 - Personal Website and Information Architecture
item.description: Develop a Personal Website to highlight all the semester/personal projects and design a Information Architecture for it's layout.

item.title: Lab 03b - Personal Website Enhancements
item.description: Enhance the project Lab03 using Artifical Intelligence.

item.title: Lab 04 - RSS and Atom Feed Implementation
item.description: Built and validated an RSS feed in XML format to publish updates from my ITWS labs.
